name: Patrick Daly
text: John Fritz was easy to deal with and to the point. Highly recommended.

name: Maggie Beler
text: Had a nice and hassle-free experience with Lithia, in large part because of John Fritz. John was so friendly and made the whole day pain free!

name: Mikalya Yuzicappi
text: Great experience! Very welcoming, friendly, patient and helpful! Thank You John Fritz for helping us out in our new chapter :)

name: Keith Belgarde
text: John Fritz was helpful with us choosing new vehicle. Recommended him. Good vibes

name: Emily Dawn
text: john rocks

name: Jacy Nunn
text: Highly recommend going to see John Fitz! Thank you John Fitz for helping me get in my new ford today!

name: Melissa Kibler
text: John Fritz is the man!! Thanks a million times for the help in getting us into a newer vehicle today!

name: Vassar Hurt
text: Amazing experience working with John Fritz. Highly recommend.

name: Flarpen Cough
text: John was amazing to work with

name: Remi A.
text: John Fritz. Made the process easy. I cant wait to travel in my new vehicle! Great car deal.

name: Ariel Rhodes
text: John Fritz helped with purchasing my first car. Great service and honest to customers.

name: Skyler Ratcliff
text: John Fritz was was a blast to work with. He did everything in his power to get us into the car we were looking for

name: gemarj1
text: I'm from Great Falls and found a used Jeep I was interested in. I called on a Saturday morning and John Fritz answered. I'm so thankful he did! He has been such a huge help from start to finish. Very responsive even after hours. Very trustworthy down to earth guy. I appreciate you John! Keep up the great work... there should be more salesman like you

name: Andy Gierswold
text: I dealt with John their internet sales guy over the phone and he did a fantastic job. The new car I was looking at had been a loaner car, he disclosed that upfront and sent me the current odometer. Everything was clear and transparent nothing was hidden. Worked hard to make things work for us.

name: Julie Gouine
text: Had a great experience today working with John Fritz. He showed us multiple cars and helped us narrow down what we wanted. He helped us greatly with buying a new-to-us vehicle today.

name: nathan harriet
text: Has been one of the best experiences I've ever had! Buying a vehicle has been seamless and John Fritz was incredibly helpful throughout the entire process.

name: Jasmine Brinley
text: John Fritz was an amazing car sales man was super friendly, easy to work with and honest. Would recommend him for your car selling needs.

name: Haley Savryk
text: John Fritz was so helpful to get me into a car. He tried every possible option even when it looked impossible for me to get into something. He was also very responsive.

name: Kelly Greene
text: Best new car buying experience I've ever had. Salesman John Fritz very knowledgeable about vehicles and financing options. Lots of good info and no pressure. Impressed with overall operation of dealership and employees.

name: Donine Gardner
text: John Fritz help with my daughter first car. We sure appreciate you and the dealership! Thank you!

name: Seven7High2002
text: Willing to go the extra mile to help close a deal. Always greeted with a smile and update on sales progress.

name: brooksbeler
text: Purchased 2 vehicles brand new from Lithia Dodge and have always had a very friendly and pain free process!

name: KWD
text: Great to work with, quick, all the team was friendly and got me into the vehicle I wanted.
